main.description: Building awesome and meaningful technology people care about.

home.description: Hi! I am a passionate developer who loves to learn and help others learn. I'm interested in all things web and all the cool and cutting-edge technologies that come with it. I specialize in Angular and React but I am very interested in Astro and SvelteKit. <0></0> In my off-time, I like to watch "The Office," play a game of darts, or go out for a drive and take in nature.
